narrative:
Hicksville Village C (precinct in Defiance County) has 678 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.6 percentage points.
